## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales pipeline, growth strategies, and operational challenges for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company aims to grow from $5M to $22M revenue this year, with potential for $1B valuation](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Current pipeline has 54 deals; closing 35% would hit annual target](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Urgent need to improve processes and prepare for rapid scaling (300+ leads expected post-Series A)](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Issues with contract dates and kickoff scheduling require immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Topics

### Growth Projections and Targets

  - [Revenue goals: $22M (2025), $59M (2026), $122M (2027)](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Current pipeline: 54 deals; 35% close rate considered safe projection](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Potential $1B valuation if $22M revenue target is hit this year](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Series A announcement expected to generate 300+ leads in one day](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Transition from $9K to $20K deal size may be slowing customer sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need for better process definition and single source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Communication issues with EAs not completing full workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Importance of improving processes before implementing new tools](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Contract and Kickoff Management

  - [Multiple contracts out for Feb 18th and 24th kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Overcommitment issue: contracts sent for same dates to multiple companies](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Need to push highest-intent prospects to sign quickly or move to March](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Goal to return to 6-week lead time for signed contracts](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

### Team and Hiring

  - [Rapid hiring necessary to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Discussion on Bruno's long-term role as the company scales](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Need to determine key hires for next 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Sales Strategy Adjustment

  - [Issue with customers not agreeing to review SLWs](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Suggestion to improve call endings to secure commitment for SOLW review](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clean up and verify all contract dates in Panda](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Prioritize highest-intent prospects for imminent kickoff dates](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Push lower-priority contracts to March to avoid overcommitment](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Schedule a detailed review of pipeline and contract statuses](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Implement new strategy for ending sales calls to secure SOLW review commitments](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Define process improvements and rules of engagement for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Assess current tools and processes to ensure they can support 10x growth](https://fathom.video/share/Dn5ZoDJW4hTF2isjbLWEb2yE_iTVTZQM?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
